long_description:
Affected support: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Withdrawn (Night) - MAD04
Location: mad04
Ensuring Shift Coverage in MAD04 for the night shift from 23:00 to  07:30 (local time) due to MEF
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Withdrawn (Night) - MAD04
close_notes: Site Unattended - Manager Available for Escalations
current_status_next_steps: No one is watching the MAD MZR queues during night shift from 23:00 - 07:30 (local time).Site manager on call for Sev 1 incidents
